_comment: Pink Drainer 'Customer' wallets are affiliates that lease the Pink Drainer toolkit. Distinct from the Pink Drainer operator addresses already in src/lib/harvesters/curated-seed.ts. To extend: open https://etherscan.io/accounts/label/pink-drainer in your browser, copy more 'Customer' rows, append below.
label: Pink Drainer Customer
notes: Affiliate of Pink Drainer DaaS — leased the toolkit and took 70-80% of victim funds while Pink Drainer kept the rest. Etherscan labels each affiliate wallet as 'Pink Drainer Customer 0x….
